name: akm_email_messages
description: List and search email messages from AKM Advisor.
description_for_agent: List and search email messages in AKM Advisor across all accounts. Parameters: folder (string, optional, default 'inbox' — inbox, sent, drafts, trash, spam), search (string, optional — search in subject, sender, snippet), is_read (boolean, optional — filter read/unread), limit (integer, optional, default 50, max 200), page (integer, optional, default 1). Returns emails with subject, sender, date, snippet, read status.

folder.description: Folder: inbox, sent, drafts, trash, spam (default: inbox)
